mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(EMAIL) FROM TB_FS_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id} and EMAIL = #{email}
SELECT CST_ID, CST_NM FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_CUST] WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT ISNULL(COUNT(FS_CHAT_ID),0) FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_DTL_MEM] B WHERE FS_CHAT_ID = #{user_id} AND FS_CHAT_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_USER] SET PWD_INIT_YN = 'Y', PWD = #{pwd}, MDFR_DT = GETDATE(), MDFR_ID = #{mdfr_id} WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id}

UPDATE [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_USER] SET USER_NM = #{user_nm}, CST_ID = #{cst_id}, CST_NM = [dbo].FN_FS_GETSNAME1('8',#{cst_id}), USER_TP_CD = #{user_tp_cd}, USER_REF_ID = #{user_ref_id}, EMAIL = #{email}, TEL_NO = #{tel_no}, MPHONE_NO = #{mphone_no}, FAX_NO = #{fax_no}, CST_TP_CD = #{cst_tp_cd}, USER_POSIT_NM = #{user_posit_nm}, USER_DEPT_NM = #{user_dept_nm}, STATUS = #{status}, MDFR_DT = GETDATE(), MDFR_ID = #{mdfr_id}, NOTICE1_YN = #{notice1_yn}, NOTICE2_YN = #{notice2_yn}, NOTICE3_YN = #{notice3_yn}, NOTICE4_YN = #{notice4_yn} WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_USER] ( USER_ID, USER_NM, CST_ID, CST_NM, USER_TP_CD, USER_REF_ID, PWD, EMAIL, TEL_NO, MPHONE_NO, FAX_NO, CST_TP_CD, USER_DEPT_NM, STATUS , RGSTR_DT, RGSTR_ID, MDFR_DT, MDFR_ID, SYS_ID, PWD_INIT_YN, NOTICE1_YN, NOTICE2_YN, NOTICE3_YN, NOTICE4_YN) VALUES(#{user_id}, #{user_nm}, #{cst_id}, [dbo].FN_FS_GETSNAME1('8',#{cst_id}), #{user_tp_cd}, #{user_ref_id}, #{pwd}, #{email}, #{tel_no}, #{mphone_no}, #{fax_no}, #{cst_tp_cd}, #{user_dept_nm}, 'Y' , GETDATE(), #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, 'FS', 'Y', #{notice1_yn}, #{notice2_yn}, #{notice3_yn}, #{notice4_yn})
